home.hero_title: Freshness from the Field to Your Table
home.hero_subtitle: Premium quality fruits and vegetables imported directly to the US.
home.benefit_1_desc: Secure routes and guaranteed on-time arrival.
home.benefit_2_desc: Products selected directly from the field.
home.products_intro_desc: Discover our wide variety of fresh fruits, crisp vegetables, and high-quality packaging solutions.
home.about_mini_desc: AR Produce and Trucking is dedicated to bringing the best of nature to your business. With years of experience in import and logistics, we ensure excellence in every shipment.
home.contact_cta_desc: Get in touch with our team today to discuss your produce needs.

about.title: About AR Produce and Trucking
about.history_desc: Founded with a passion for quality and fresh produce, AR Produce and Trucking has grown into a leading importer of fruits and vegetables in the United States. Our journey began with a simple goal: to bridge the gap between dedicated farmers and businesses seeking the finest produce.
about.mission_desc: To provide our customers with the highest quality fresh produce, ensuring reliable delivery and exceptional service while fostering sustainable relationships with our growers.
about.vision_desc: To be the most trusted and preferred partner in the produce import and distribution industry, recognized for our commitment to quality, integrity, and innovation.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.subtitle: Our Commitment to Excellence
quality.desc: We adhere to the highest international standards to ensure that every product we deliver meets strict quality and safety requirements.
